name: Chocolate Mallow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, soda, salt, and vanilla extract.
3. Add the shortening, eggs, and melted chocolate to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the water and sour cream until smooth.
5. Gently fold in the halved marshmallows.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
